name: Incentivio Restaurant Loyalty and Mobile App API
what_it_does: Incentivio restaurant loyalty and branded mobile app REST API for independent restaurants, local chains, and boutique food service brands to manage customer rewards, mobile ordering, and engagement without enterprise-tier investment. Enables AI agents to manage loyalty program enrollment and points management for restaurant customer retention automation, handle branded mobile app ordering for restaurant direct channel automation, access customer engagement campaign management for restaurant marketing automation, retrieve customer order history and lifetime value for restaurant CRM automation, manage push notification and in-app messaging for restaurant customer communication automation, handle challenge and gamification program for restaurant engagement optimization automation, access referral program management for restaurant customer acquisition automation, retrieve loyalty analytics and redemption reporting for restaurant program performance automation, manage menu and pricing for branded app ordering, and integrate Incentivio with POS systems and delivery platforms for restaurant customer engagement ecosystem management.
use_cases: Running loyalty programs from independent restaurant engagement agents
Managing branded mobile apps from restaurant direct channel agents
Automating campaigns from restaurant marketing automation agents
Tracking customer LTV from restaurant CRM analytics agents
not_for: Enterprise QSR chains needing kiosk ordering (use Tillster)
Pure online ordering without loyalty (use ChowNow)
best_when: An independent restaurant, local chain, or boutique food service brand wanting AI agents to automate customer loyalty rewards, branded mobile app management, personalized marketing campaigns, and customer engagement without enterprise-tier software costs.
avoid_when: LOYALTY PROGRAM TERMS AND UNCLAIMED PROPERTY: Automated loyalty point issuance via Incentivio creates customer property liability; accumulated unredeemed points may be subject to state unclaimed property escheatment after dormancy period; automated point expiration without state unclaimed property analysis creates state regulatory compliance risk. PUSH NOTIFICATION TCPA COMPLIANCE FOR MARKETING: Automated push notification marketing via Incentivio mobile app requires TCPA-compliant opt-in for marketing notifications; automated marketing push without verified opt-in consent creates TCPA violation for mobile marketing. GDPR FOR EUROPEAN RESTAURANT CUSTOMERS: Automated customer data collection and loyalty profiling via Incentivio for restaurant operators with European customer base requires GDPR data processing basis; automated loyalty enrollment without GDPR consent mechanism creates GDPR compliance gap.

auth.notes: Incentivio uses API key and OAuth for restaurant and partner integrations. REST API with JSON. Boston, Massachusetts HQ. Founded 2013. Private. Focused on independent restaurants, local chains, and boutique food service brands. Branded mobile app, loyalty, push notification, and campaign management. POS integration via direct and middleware connections. Competes with Paytronix, Punchh, and Thanx for restaurant loyalty and engagement.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — per-location subscription for restaurant loyalty and mobile app
pricing.paid_tiers: Per-location monthly subscription; branded mobile app tier; enterprise pricing for multi-location operators
pricing.notes: Boston MA. Private. Founded 2013. Per-location monthly subscription. Branded app tier. No free tier.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; loyalty and campaign queries throttled; webhooks for loyalty and order events

known_agent_gotchas: LOYALTY POINTS ESCHEATING DORMANCY ANALYSIS: Incentivio loyalty points have configurable expiration; unredeemed points after expiration may constitute unclaimed property subject to state escheatment after dormancy period; automated point management must integrate state-specific unclaimed property analysis before bulk point expiration execution; point escheatment varies significantly by state

PUSH NOTIFICATION OPT-IN VERIFICATION: Automated push notification campaigns via Incentivio mobile app must verify customer has opted in to marketing notifications; iOS and Android notification permission is separate from loyalty enrollment; automated marketing push to customers without verified notification opt-in creates unsubscribed notification delivery and potential TCPA exposure for promotional SMS

CAMPAIGN SCHEDULING TIMEZONE FOR MULTI-LOCATION: Automated campaign scheduling for multi-location restaurant operators must specify campaign delivery in customer local timezone; automated promotional push scheduled in server timezone without customer timezone conversion creates off-hours promotional delivery creating poor customer experience

REFERRAL PROGRAM FRAUD SELF-REFERRAL: Automated referral program management via Incentivio must implement self-referral detection and household deduplication; automated referral reward without referrer-referee relationship validation creates referral fraud exposure for restaurant operators offering significant referral incentives

POS SYNC LAP FOR ORDER-TRIGGERED LOYALTY AWARD: Automated loyalty point award triggered by POS order completion has processing lag between POS transaction and Incentivio loyalty award; automated customer notification of loyalty points earned should not fire until POS sync confirms order completion; premature loyalty notification before POS sync creates point discrepancy

BRANDED APP STORE REVIEW TIMELINE FOR UPDATES: Automated branded mobile app content updates via Incentivio that require app binary update (vs CMS content update) are subject to Apple App Store and Google Play review; automated deployment pipeline for branded app features must account for 1-3 day app store review timeline; design automated content updates to use Incentivio CMS rather than binary updates where possible
agent_readiness.security_notes: Restaurant loyalty and mobile app. PCI-DSS. API key/OAuth. US. Customer loyalty data, order history, and PII.

security_score_components.security_notes: Restaurant loyalty. PCI-DSS. API key/OAuth. US. Customer loyalty, order, and personal data.
